anchors.title: Information quality wins
anchors.decision_rule: Prefer accurate, relevant, sufficient information over fluent filler or generic structure.

anchors.title: Examples need purpose
anchors.decision_rule: Facts and examples matter most when they explain the assigned topic for the intended audience.

anchors.title: Organization supports usability
anchors.decision_rule: Headings, sections, and transitions help, but they should not outrank accuracy and completeness.

caution_checks: Is the content accurate and relevant?
Does the paper explain enough for the assigned purpose?
Is surface fluency masking thin information?
